name: Bordeaux Zellgef
alt_names: ボルドー・ツェルゲフ
description: Bordeaux Zellgef is a member of the Sage Council. During the Demi-Human war, he acted as the captain of the Zellgef Squadron. Four decades ago during the Demi-Human War, Bordeaux was a tall, muscular and somewhat frightening man, usually donned in heavy iron armour and wielding a massive battle axe. He had short and spiky light blue hair, and equally blue and thick eyebrows. His eyes radiated a strong fighting spirit.
